author: audit-agent

patch.value:
Verification evidence:
- POST https://pm-cli.unbrained.dev/v1/events: HTTP 200, accepted:1
- GET https://pm.unbrained.dev: HTTP 302 (Grafana)
- docker compose ps: 9 containers all Up/Healthy (api, worker, grafana, loki, tempo, prometheus, alloy, rabbitmq, postgres)
- .gitignore: .agents/pm/runtime/telemetry/ excluded
- CLI runtime.ts uses event_type/occurred_at matching API TelemetryEnvelope
- Sensitive data redaction working: emails, tokens, passwords, paths all sanitized
- Queue flush: batch 100, retry with backoff, 2.5s timeout
Telemetry pipeline verified: all 9 containers healthy, E2E event ingestion working

Full audit of remote telemetry stack confirms all components operational. API accepts events, Grafana accessible, all 9 Docker containers running. Telemetry data not published to GitHub. CLI fields match API contract.

message: Audit verification: telemetry pipeline E2E confirmed

patch.value: All telemetry components verified operational - 9/9 containers healthy, E2E event flow confirmed, security verified
